conversations.title: Chinese output regression
conversations.snippet: Ensure prompt and output stay stable in Chinese mode.

conversations.title: Embedding API alignment
conversations.snippet: Check conflicts between summary chain and embedding endpoint.

conversations.title: Multi-link runtime observability
conversations.snippet: Track proxy and BYOK route parity.

highlights: Chinese output stability checks were completed, and weekly narratives remained readable across regeneration runs.
Embedding API alignment reduced multi-link contract drift between proxy and BYOK execution paths.
recurring_questions: How can multi-link observability stay consistent when route-specific retries produce different timing patterns?

cross_domain_echoes.shared_logic: Both areas require explicit contracts so that local changes do not silently break downstream behavior.

unresolved_threads: The interaction between embedding retrieval quality and weekly semantic gates still needs longer-range sampling.
suggested_focus: Publish a weekly stability dashboard that tracks low-signal rate and evidence consistency for each route mode.

evidence.note: Verified Chinese output stability after prompt baseline migration.
Documented embedding API conflict boundaries and integration guardrails.
